bug_report.summary: FileSystem dock selection/row highlight renders differently (corner/edge pixels change) after change
steps_to_reproduce: Launch the editor and open a project.
Create a new folder in the FileSystem dock (accept default name).
Ensure the folder row is selected (as in the screenshot sequence).
Compare the FileSystem row highlight rendering (left/right edges/corners).
expected_behaviors: Row/selection highlight rendering in the FileSystem dock should remain unchanged by the tree-rename LineEdit corner fix.
actual_behaviors: Row/selection highlight shows subtle rendering differences at the left/right edges/corners (differences observed at the four marked regions: bbox [37,556,46,565], [37,578,46,587], [202,556,211,565], [202,578,211,587]).
